_doc.purpose: Configuration template for the TAA table onboarding tool.

fields.table_uuid: UUID from the OneLake file path: .../Tables/<UUID>/TableData_*/
fields.is_multi_tenant: true if DATABASEPHYSICALNAME is derived from the file path (most tables). false for CUSTOMER, ENTERPRISECUSTOMER (DATABASEPHYSICALNAME is a real payload column).
fields.wave: 1 = no FK dependency on another table; 2 = must wait for a Wave 1 table.
fields.wave2_parent: Required when wave=2. The Wave 1 table this table depends on (e.g. 'USERINFO').
fields.load_order: Numeric sort order in INGEST_TAA_TABLE_CONFIG. Lower numbers run first in sequential contexts. Suggest: 10=wave1, 20=wave2.
fields.is_active_full_load: Set to false to exclude from full load runs without deleting the config row.
fields.is_active_delta_load: Set to false to exclude from delta load runs.

columns._doc: Ordered list of columns in the Snowflake target table.
columns.name: Column name exactly as it appears in Snowflake DDL.
columns.sf_type: Snowflake data type (e.g. NUMBER(38,0), VARCHAR(16777216), BOOLEAN, TIMESTAMP_NTZ(9)).
columns.pk: true if this column is part of the primary key.
columns.not_null: true to add NOT NULL constraint (default true). Set false for nullable columns.
columns.is_tenant_key: Informational only -- marks DATABASEPHYSICALNAME. The tool uses is_multi_tenant to decide how to handle it.

_csv_positions: CSV delta files have 4 metadata columns before data columns:
$5+ = actual table columns (in source schema order)
For multi-tenant tables DATABASEPHYSICALNAME is NOT a CSV column --
it is derived from METADATA$FILENAME by the tool automatically.
including DATABASEPHYSICALNAME are positional starting at $5.

description: Description of what this table contains.

columns.name: DATABASEPHYSICALNAME
columns._note: For multi-tenant tables this is always first. Derived from file path in both Parquet and CSV loads.

columns.name: ENDDATETIME
columns._note: Nullable example -- not_null set to false
